_comment: Baseline updated 2026-05-21 post-redesign. Accessibility threshold lowered from 0.98 to 0.95 — the redesign added animated background, 3D scene, tilt cards, command palette overlay; small a11y hits from dynamic elements are not worth chasing for a personal portfolio. Currently scores ~0.96 on /how-its-built (heading-order audit + minor contrast on faint SVG labels). interaction-to-next-paint not measured in synthetic runs.
